summary: Frontend-only testing of 5 new pages: InsightDetail, NotFound, NoticeHandling, AITaxAssistant, ClientPortal. All critical features verified via Playwright against production URL.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 5 pages fully verified. InsightDetail: budget article full content with Tax Slab table, 6-item ToC sidebar, 3 related articles; coming-soon state for other slugs; redirect to /insights for unknown slugs. NotFound: 404 large number, 4 nav cards, Go back home button navigates to /. NoticeHandling: urgency badge, hero, 4 notice type cards, 3-step process, 5-item FAQ accordion (clickable), final CTA band. AITaxAssistant: heading, Q3 2025 badge, 4 feature cards, email+notify form. ClientPortal: heading, Q4 2025 badge, portal wireframe mockup, 4 feature cards, 'Already a VNAV Associates client?' card with WhatsApp button, 'Not a client yet?' card with /contact CTA. Insights listing: article cards have 'Read article' links, Budget 2025 card shows 'Full article' badge.
